channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Donald Trump Trash-Talks Barack Obama in Tribute to Jesse Jackson
item.description: Hours after Reverend Jesse Jackson's death, President Donald Trump memorialized the civil rights pioneer in a way only Trump could ... by making it al...

item.title: 'Chicago Fire' Star Brittany Curran Arrested, Booked on Drunk in Public Charge
item.description: "Chicago Fire" star Brittany Curran has been arrested, TMZ has learned. According to the Burbank Police Department, the 35-year-old actress showed up ...

item.title: Lindsey Vonn Returns Home After Olympic Nightmare, Still Can’t Stand
item.description: Lindsey Vonn is back stateside -- even if she still can’t get back on her feet. The Olympic ski legend revealed Monday night on X she’s back on “home ...

item.title: Pedro Pascal & Rafael Olarra Watch 'Wuthering Heights' Together in Theater
item.description: Pedro Pascal and Rafael Olarra have been getting close lately ... after being snapped sightseeing in NYC over the Valentine's Day weekend, we now have...

item.title: Olympic Sprinter Fred Kerley's Battery Charge Dropped
item.description: The battery charge against two-time Olympic medalist Fred Kerley was dropped on Tuesday, according to his lawyer, who tells TMZ Sports that prosecutor...

item.title: An Upcoming Sequel To A 20-Year-Old Film May Be A Major 2026 Box Office Competitor
Sylvester Stallone's Best Acting Isn't In Rocky But Is In This '80s Action Movie
Billy Bob Thornton's Villain Stole This Infamous 1990s Action Movie With Only 3 Minutes Of Screentime
